dialogue_text: A man who goes up in a balloon on circus day, so as to draw a crowd of people together and get them to pay to see the circus,
source_excerpt: "A man who goes up in a balloon on circus day, so as to draw a crowd of people together and get them to pay to see the circus," he explained.
